channel.title: Cuisine du Nord, from the kitchen
channel.description: Notes from the home kitchen and Booth B47. Quebecois catering in Portland, by Yves Quinn.
channel.copyright: (c) 2026 Cuisine du Nord. All rights reserved.

item.title: Reveillon pre-orders are open
item.dc:creator: Yves Quinn
item.description: Six course Quebecois reveillon menu for the parish hall and private home bookings, 24 to 31 December. Twenty seats left at writing.

item.title: Saturday market, fall recap
item.dc:creator: Yves Quinn
item.description: Eight Saturdays at Booth B47, what sold, what stayed in the warmer, and what we are bringing back in December.

item.title: The kimchi tourtiere collaboration with Sienna Park
item.dc:creator: Yves Quinn
item.description: How a Sunday kitchen experiment with chef Sienna Park turned into a market bestseller. Kimchi, pork, the crust we use, and where we landed on heat.

item.title: Our first 60-cover booking, what we learned
item.dc:creator: Yves Quinn
item.description: A late-November holiday lunch that doubled our previous record. Crew of three, four-hour service window, two things we changed for the next booking.

item.title: Why Quebecois comfort food in Portland
item.dc:creator: Yves Quinn
item.description: A short note about the move from Montreal, why Beaverton, and what tourtiere meant in my house growing up.
